server.name: courtlistener-mcp
server.description: Legal research MCP server providing comprehensive access to CourtListener legal database

tools.name: search_opinions
tools.description: Search for legal opinions with various filters and parameters
tools.title: Search Opinions

tools.name: search_cases
tools.description: Search for legal cases and opinions using CourtListener's comprehensive database with advanced filtering capabilities
tools.title: Search Cases

tools.name: advanced_search
tools.description: Execute advanced legal research queries with multi-parameter filtering
tools.title: Advanced Search

tools.name: get_case_details
tools.description: Get comprehensive details about a specific case including full metadata, citations, and related information
tools.title: Get Case Details

tools.name: get_related_cases
tools.description: Find cases related to a specific case
tools.title: Get Related Cases

tools.name: analyze_case_authorities
tools.description: Analyze the legal authorities cited in a case
tools.title: Analyze Case Authorities

tools.name: get_opinion_text
tools.description: Retrieve the full text content of a specific legal opinion, including HTML and plain text formats
tools.title: Get Opinion Text

tools.name: analyze_legal_argument
tools.description: Analyze a legal argument by finding supporting and opposing cases, with AI-powered relevance assessment. ⚡ Moderate API cost.
tools.title: Analyze Legal Argument

tools.name: get_citation_network
tools.description: Analyze citation networks and precedent relationships to understand case law evolution and influence
tools.title: Get Citation Network

tools.name: lookup_citation
tools.description: Look up cases by legal citation
tools.title: Lookup Citation

tools.name: list_courts
tools.description: List all available courts with their metadata, jurisdiction information, and operational status

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response (alternative to page/page_size)

limit.description: Number of results to return (used with cursor)

tools.title: List Courts

tools.name: get_judges
tools.description: Get information about judges

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response (alternative to page/page_size)

limit.description: Number of results to return (used with cursor)

tools.title: Get Judges

tools.name: get_judge
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific judge
tools.title: Get Judge

tools.name: get_dockets
tools.description: Get docket information with filtering options
tools.title: Get Dockets

tools.name: get_docket
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific docket
tools.title: Get Docket

tools.name: get_docket_entries
tools.description: Get individual court filings and orders for a specific docket, providing case timeline and procedural history
tools.title: Get Docket Entries

tools.name: get_recap_documents
tools.description: Get RECAP documents for a docket
tools.title: Get Recap Documents

tools.name: get_recap_document
tools.description: Get a specific RECAP document
tools.title: Get Recap Document

tools.name: get_financial_disclosures
tools.description: Get financial disclosures for judges
tools.title: Get Financial Disclosures

tools.name: get_financial_disclosure
tools.description: Get details of a specific financial disclosure
tools.title: Get Financial Disclosure

tools.name: get_parties_and_attorneys
tools.description: Get parties and attorneys information for a case
tools.title: Get Parties And Attorneys

tools.name: manage_alerts
tools.description: Manage legal alerts and notifications
tools.title: Manage Alerts

tools.name: get_oral_arguments
tools.description: Get oral arguments with filtering options
tools.title: Get Oral Arguments

tools.name: get_oral_argument
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific oral argument
tools.title: Get Oral Argument

tools.name: get_visualization_data
tools.description: Generate visualization-ready legal analytics datasets
tools.title: Get Visualization Data

tools.name: get_bulk_data
tools.description: Provide guidance and samples for CourtListener bulk data access
tools.title: Get Bulk Data

tools.name: get_bankruptcy_data
tools.description: Retrieve bankruptcy-related docket data with contextual insights
tools.title: Get Bankruptcy Data

tools.name: get_comprehensive_judge_profile
tools.description: Get complete judicial profile including positions, education, political affiliations, ABA ratings, and financial disclosures. ⚡ Moderate API cost.
tools.title: Get Comprehensive Judge Profile

tools.name: get_comprehensive_case_analysis
tools.description: Get complete case analysis including docket entries, parties, attorneys, and tags for full case intelligence. ⚡ Moderate API cost.
tools.title: Get Comprehensive Case Analysis

tools.name: get_financial_disclosure_details
tools.description: Get detailed financial disclosure information including investments, debts, gifts, and income sources
tools.title: Get Financial Disclosure Details

tools.name: validate_citations
tools.description: Validate and parse citations from text to prevent AI hallucinations and ensure accurate legal references
tools.title: Validate Citations

tools.name: get_enhanced_recap_data
tools.description: Access advanced RECAP/PACER features including document fetching and email notifications
tools.title: Get Enhanced Recap Data

tools.name: smart_search
tools.description: Intelligently search for cases using natural language. Uses an LLM to optimize search parameters.

query.description: Natural language query describing what you are looking for

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.title: Smart Search

tools.name: mcp_async_get_job
tools.title: Async Job Status
tools.description: Get async job status by job ID

jobId.description: Async job ID returned by async tool execution

tools.name: mcp_async_get_job_result
tools.title: Async Job Result
tools.description: Get async job result payload by job ID

jobId.description: Async job ID returned by async tool execution

tools.name: mcp_async_cancel_job
tools.title: Async Job Cancel
tools.description: Cancel async job execution by job ID

jobId.description: Async job ID returned by async tool execution

resources.name: Example Opinion 123456
resources.description: Example of a legal opinion resource
resources.title: Example Opinion 123456

resources.name: Example Case 123456
resources.description: Example of a case/opinion cluster resource
resources.title: Example Case 123456

resources.name: Recent Opinions
resources.description: Dynamic listing of opinions filed in the last 7 days
resources.title: Recent Opinions

resources.name: API Status
resources.description: Check API connectivity, cache stats, and rate limit status
resources.title: API Status

prompts.name: legal_assistant
prompts.title: Legal Assistant
prompts.description: Sets up the context for a legal research assistant with specific focus areas

arguments.name: focus_area
arguments.description: The specific area of law to focus on (e.g., "Constitutional Law", "Bankruptcy")

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: The jurisdiction to prioritize (e.g., "US Supreme Court", "California")

prompts.name: summarize-statute
prompts.title: Summarize Statute
prompts.description: Generate a concise summary of a statute or legal provision

arguments.name: statute_text
arguments.description: The full text of the statute to summarize

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: The jurisdiction (e.g., federal, state)

prompts.name: compare-precedents
prompts.title: Compare Precedents
prompts.description: Compare and contrast multiple legal precedents

arguments.name: case_citations
arguments.description: Comma-separated list of case citations to compare

arguments.name: focus_issue
arguments.description: Specific legal issue to focus the comparison on

prompts.name: analyze-case
prompts.title: Analyze Case
prompts.description: Perform comprehensive analysis of a legal case

arguments.name: case_citation
arguments.description: Citation of the case to analyze

arguments.name: analysis_type
arguments.description: Type of analysis: holding, reasoning, impact, or full

prompts.name: draft-brief-section
prompts.title: Draft Brief Section
prompts.description: Help draft a section of a legal brief

arguments.name: section_type
arguments.description: Type of section: facts, argument, conclusion

arguments.name: key_points
arguments.description: Key points to include (comma-separated)

arguments.name: supporting_cases
arguments.description: Supporting case citations

prompts.name: identify-issues
prompts.title: Identify Issues
prompts.description: Identify legal issues in a factual scenario

arguments.name: fact_pattern
arguments.description: Description of the factual scenario

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Applicable jurisdiction

prompts.name: legal_research_workflow
prompts.title: Legal Research Workflow
prompts.description: Step-by-step case research workflow guiding through searching, analyzing, and synthesizing findings

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: The legal topic or question to research

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: The jurisdiction to focus on (e.g., "federal", "California")

prompts.name: citation_analysis
prompts.title: Citation Analysis
prompts.description: Analyze the citation network for a case, including cited cases and citation patterns

arguments.name: case_citation
arguments.description: The citation of the case to analyze (e.g., "410 U.S. 113")

prompts.name: jurisdiction_comparison
prompts.title: Jurisdiction Comparison
prompts.description: Compare how different jurisdictions approach a legal issue

arguments.name: legal_issue
arguments.description: The legal issue to compare across jurisdictions

arguments.name: jurisdictions
arguments.description: Comma-separated list of jurisdictions to compare (e.g., "California, New York, Texas")

prompts.name: case_brief
prompts.title: Case Brief
prompts.description: Generate a structured case brief from a court opinion

arguments.name: opinion_id
arguments.description: The opinion ID to brief (CourtListener opinion ID)

prompts.name: motion_drafting
prompts.title: Motion Drafting
prompts.description: Draft a motion outline supported by case law research

arguments.name: motion_type
arguments.description: Type of motion (e.g., "Motion to Dismiss", "Summary Judgment", "Motion to Compel")

arguments.name: supporting_cases
arguments.description: Optional comma-separated case citations to use as supporting authority

prompts.name: judicial_due_diligence
prompts.title: Judicial Due Diligence
prompts.description: Review a judge's financial disclosures, background, and ruling patterns

arguments.name: judge_name
arguments.description: The name of the judge to research
